# Copilot Instructions

## Project Guidelines
- When implementing tasks in this repository, do not change docs markdown files unless explicitly requested; use them as specifications for system changes.

## Specification Documents
The following markdown files in the `docs/` folder are the authoritative specifications for this system. Refer to them when planning or implementing changes:

- [`docs/rule-model-design.md`](../docs/rule-model-design.md) — Rule model design specification.
- [`docs/system-use-cases.md`](../docs/system-use-cases.md) — System use cases.
- [`docs/windows-ui.md`](../docs/windows-ui.md) — Windows UI specification.
